---
title: "Projetos"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*/index.qmd"      # Varre todas as pastas e busca o index principal
  type: grid             # Layout clean e profissional
  sort: "date desc"      # O mais recente primeiro
  categories: true       # Filtros laterais (importante para recrutadores)
  sort-ui: true          # Permite ao usuário reordenar
  filter-ui: true        # Campo de busca rápida
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
---

> Challenges aren't roadblocks; they're blueprints for the next version of the plan.
